# Geotecnia1 — Foz do Iguaçu

> Geotechnical engineering services in Foz do Iguaçu, Brasil.

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Foz do Iguaçu, Brasil.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
